Vulkar Wraith原來咁勁
我差D掉撚左
使唔使紫卡先秒到?

replies.msg:
Vulkar因為紫卡係五星，有紫卡會好好多(自己用緊張+crit dmg+heat -reload speed用到想死 )
唔用Vulkar Wraith都得，打eidolon三大狙都係Lanka,Vulkar Wraith同Vectis Prime(新手可以用Rubico，佢開鏡加crit)
modding同warframe都好重要，三把狙都係crit+radiation build(對應eidolon嘅Alloy armor)
choices of warframe就可以用返Chroma(vex armor嘅fury效果)同Volt(電盾buff)或者Harrow(Covenant喺eidolon energy spikes無敵，retaliation buff可以加大crit chance打紅crit)
